seoTitle: Hunchy vs Hurricane — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hunchy and Hurricane. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hunchy and Hurricane.
heading: Hunchy vs Hurricane — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hunchy, Queensland and Hurricane, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hurricane has a lower overall climate risk score (24/100) compared to Hunchy (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hunchy or Hurricane safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hunchy has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Hurricane scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hunchy scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Hurricane scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hunchy or Hurricane?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hurricane has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
